/bin/bash -lc "python3 << 'PYEOF'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from statsmodels.tsa.filters.hp_filter import hpfilter

def extract_series(filepath):
    \"\"\"Extract annual data + quarterly averages for incomplete years.\"\"\"
    df = pd.read_excel(filepath, header=None)
    
    annual = {}
    quarterly = {}
    current_q_year = None
    
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        label = str(row.iloc[0]).strip()
        val = row.iloc[1]
        
        if pd.isna(val):
            continue
        
        # Annual row: e.g. \"1973.\"
        year_match = re.match(r'"'^('"\\d{4})\\."'$'"', label)
        if year_match:
            year = int(year_match.group(1))
            annual[year] = float(val)
            current_q_year = None
            continue
        
        # Quarterly row with year: e.g. \"2024: I.\"
        q_year_match = re.match(r'"'^('"\\d{4}):\\s*(I{1,3}V?)', label)
        if q_year_match:
            current_q_year = int(q_year_match.group(1))
            if current_q_year not in quarterly:
                quarterly[current_q_year] = []
            quarterly[current_q_year].append(float(val))
            continue
        
        # Continuation quarterly row: e.g. \"    II.\", \"    III p.\", \"    IV.\"
        q_cont_match = re.match(r'"'^'"\\s+(I{1,3}V?)\\b', label)
        if q_cont_match and current_q_year is not None:
            quarterly[current_q_year].append(float(val))
            continue
    
    # For years with only quarterly data (no annual row), average the quarters
    for year, qvals in quarterly.items():
        if year not in annual:
            annual[year] = sum(qvals) / len(qvals)
            print(f\"  {year}: avg of {len(qvals)} quarters = {annual[year]:.2f} (vals: {qvals})\")
    
    return annual

# Extract PCE
print(\"PCE extraction:\")
pce = extract_series('/root/ERP-2025-table10.xls')

# Extract PFI
print(\"\\nPFI extraction:\")
pfi = extract_series('/root/ERP-2025-table12.xls')

# Load CPI
cpi_df = pd.read_excel('/root/CPI.xlsx')
cpi_map = dict(zip(cpi_df.iloc[:, 0].astype(int), cpi_df.iloc[:, 1].astype(float)))

# Build aligned series for 1973-2024
years = list(range(1973, 2025))
real_pce = np.array([pce[y] / cpi_map[y] for y in years])
real_pfi = np.array([pfi[y] / cpi_map[y] for y in years])

print(f\"\\nYears: {years[0]}-{years[-1]} ({len(years)} obs)\")
print(f\"Real PCE: {real_pce[0]:.1f} ... {real_pce[-1]:.1f}\")
print(f\"Real PFI: {real_pfi[0]:.1f} ... {real_pfi[-1]:.1f}\")

# HP filter on log real series
log_pce = np.log(real_pce)
log_pfi = np.log(real_pfi)

cycle_pce, trend_pce = hpfilter(log_pce, lamb=100)
cycle_pfi, trend_pfi = hpfilter(log_pfi, lamb=100)

# Pearson correlation
corr = np.corrcoef(cycle_pce, cycle_pfi)[0, 1]
result = round(corr, 5)

print(f\"\\nCorrelation: {corr}\")
print(f\"Rounded: {result}\")

with open('/root/answer.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write(str(result))

print(f\"Written to /root/answer.txt\")
PYEOF

import re

# Test the regex against actual strings
test_labels = ['2024: I.', '    II.', '    III p.', '    IV.']
for label in test_labels:
    label = label.strip()  # THIS IS THE BUG - strip() removes leading spaces
    q_year_match = re.match(r'"'^('"\\d{4}):\\s*(I{1,3}V?)', label)
    q_cont_match = re.match(r'"'^'"\\s+(I{1,3}V?)\\b', label)
    print(f\"  '{label}' -> year_match={bool(q_year_match)}, cont_match={bool(q_cont_match)}\")

# After strip(), \"    II.\" becomes \"II.\" which doesn't match "'^'"\\s+ pattern
print(\"\\nWithout strip:\")
for label in test_labels:
    q_year_match = re.match(r'"'^('"\\d{4}):\\s*(I{1,3}V?)', label)
    q_cont_match = re.match(r'"'^'"\\s+(I{1,3}V?)\\b', label)
    print(f\"  '{label}' -> year_match={bool(q_year_match)}, cont_match={bool(q_cont_match)}\")

/bin/bash -lc "python3 << 'PYEOF'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from statsmodels.tsa.filters.hp_filter import hpfilter

def extract_series(filepath):
    \"\"\"Extract annual data + quarterly averages for incomplete years.\"\"\"
    df = pd.read_excel(filepath, header=None)
    
    annual = {}
    quarterly = {}
    current_q_year = None
    
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        raw_label = str(row.iloc[0])  # DO NOT strip - need leading spaces
        val = row.iloc[1]
        
        if pd.isna(val):
            continue
        
        # Annual row: e.g. \"1973.\"
        year_match = re.match(r'"'^('"\\d{4})\\.\\s*"'$'"', raw_label)
        if year_match:
            year = int(year_match.group(1))
            annual[year] = float(val)
            current_q_year = None
            continue
        
        # Quarterly row with year: e.g. \"2024: I.\"
        q_year_match = re.match(r'"'^('"\\d{4}):\\s*(I{1,3}V?)', raw_label)
        if q_year_match:
            current_q_year = int(q_year_match.group(1))
            if current_q_year not in quarterly:
                quarterly[current_q_year] = []
            quarterly[current_q_year].append(float(val))
            continue
        
        # Continuation quarterly row: e.g. \"    II.\", \"    III p.\"
        q_cont_match = re.match(r'"'^'"\\s+(I{1,3}V?)\\b', raw_label)
        if q_cont_match and current_q_year is not None:
            quarterly[current_q_year].append(float(val))
            continue
    
    # For years with only quarterly data, average the quarters
    for year, qvals in quarterly.items():
        if year not in annual:
            annual[year] = sum(qvals) / len(qvals)
            print(f\"  {year}: avg of {len(qvals)} quarters = {annual[year]:.2f} (vals: {qvals})\")
    
    return annual

# Extract PCE
print(\"PCE extraction:\")
pce = extract_series('/root/ERP-2025-table10.xls')

# Extract PFI
print(\"\\nPFI extraction:\")
pfi = extract_series('/root/ERP-2025-table12.xls')

# Load CPI
cpi_df = pd.read_excel('/root/CPI.xlsx')
cpi_map = dict(zip(cpi_df.iloc[:, 0].astype(int), cpi_df.iloc[:, 1].astype(float)))

# Build aligned series for 1973-2024
years = list(range(1973, 2025))
real_pce = np.array([pce[y] / cpi_map[y] for y in years])
real_pfi = np.array([pfi[y] / cpi_map[y] for y in years])

print(f\"\\nYears: {years[0]}-{years[-1]} ({len(years)} obs)\")
print(f\"Real PCE 2024: {real_pce[-1]:.1f}\")
print(f\"Real PFI 2024: {real_pfi[-1]:.1f}\")

# HP filter on log real series
log_pce = np.log(real_pce)
log_pfi = np.log(real_pfi)

cycle_pce, trend_pce = hpfilter(log_pce, lamb=100)
cycle_pfi, trend_pfi = hpfilter(log_pfi, lamb=100)

# Pearson correlation
corr = np.corrcoef(cycle_pce, cycle_pfi)[0, 1]
result = round(corr, 5)

print(f\"\\nCorrelation: {corr}\")
print(f\"Rounded: {result}\")

with open('/root/answer.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write(str(result))

print(f\"Written to /root/answer.txt\")
PYEOF
"
cat /root/answer.txt
